creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
>>>>> "AE" == Alan Eldridge <alane@geeksrus.net> writes:

AE> I guess we could also modify pam.conf on installation of kdebase2 port.
AE> Should we then undo the mod if kdebase2 is uninstalled?


Either that or just add the kdm configs into it like the gnome folks
did for gdm.  It seems only fair ;-)
